'''Lol Miilarta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hapan]] from [[Terephon]]. She was that [[Planet/Legends|world's]] delegate in the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]], and voted to ally with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
